title: YDM's Ostrich
description: This mod adds a rideable Ostrich mob to the game.
body:
This mod adds an Ostrich mob to the game.

You can ride it if you use a saddle on it.

They can attack while you mount them.

It can be tempted, tamed and bred with apple, wheat and seeds.

After mating it will lay down some eggs. (Don't step on it!)

You can find them in the savanna biome

and they will attack spiders.
